\n按类型显示已用缓存大小与允许大小的百分比。\n接近 100% 的值表示最大的:
Shows the percentage of used cache size against the allowed size, by type.
Values close to 100% indicate the maximum potential utilization.
Values close to 0% indicate that the cache is underutilized.
* - 不支持的查询路径\n\n/write - 插入虚拟机\n\n/metri:
* - unsupported query path

/write - insert into VM

/metrics - query VM system metrics

/query - query instant values

/query_range - query over a time range

/series - match a certain label set

/label/{}/values - query the list of label values (mostly variables)
5分钟请求速率：\n* ' * ' -不支持的查询路径 \n* ' /write:
Request rate over 5m:
* ' * ' - unsupported query path 
* ' /write ' - insert into VM 
* ' /metrics ' - query VM system metrics 
* ' /query ' - query instant values 
* ' /query_range ' - query over a time range 
* ' /series ' - match a certain label set 
* ' /label/{}/values ' - query the list of label values (mostly variables)
> 0表示vmstorage处于只读模式。: > 0 means vmstorage is in read-only mode.
RSS share for memory allocated by the pr: RSS share for memory allocated by the process itself. This share cannot be freed by the OS, so it must be taken into account by OOM killer.
VictoriaMetrics 使用 -maxLabelsPerTimeseri:
VictoriaMetrics limits the number of labels per metric with the -maxLabelsPerTimeseries command-line flag.

This prevents ingesting metrics with too many labels. The value of maxLabelsPerTimeseries must be tuned according to your workload.

When the limit is exceeded (chart > 0) the extra labels are dropped, which may result in unexpectedly identical time series.
vm-insert 和 vm-storage 组件之间连接的饱和度大于9: Connection saturation between vm-insert and vm-storage exceeds 0.9
vmselect 节点接受的请求率: Rate of requests accepted by vmselect nodes
使用数据类型的磁盘使用率百分比: Percentage of disk usage by data type
共享进程本身分配的内存。当内存使用率达到100%时，有被OOM-killed.的: Memory allocated by the process itself. When memory usage reaches 100%, there is a risk of being OOM-killed.
在复制之前，每秒有多少个数据点通过协议插入到集群中: How many datapoints per second are inserted into the cluster via the protocol, before replication
存储节点中正在进行的合并数。预计会有大量的[存储/小指标]。: Number of merges in progress on storage nodes. A high number is expected for [storage/small] metrics.
存储节点每秒合并的行数: Rows merged per second on storage nodes
已用内存的百分比（常驻）。当内存使用率接近 100% 时，应用程序的性能将显着下: Percentage of used memory (resident). When memory usage approaches 100%, application performance degrades significantly.
已用内存的百分比（常驻）。当内存使用率接近 100% 时，应用程序的性能将表示在: Percentage of used memory (resident). When memory usage approaches 100%, application performance starts to degrade.
已经使用的磁盘空间总量: Total amount of disk space already used
当 vmstorage 节点无法访问 vminsert 时显示，默认无数据。: Shown when a vmstorage node cannot be reached by vminsert; no data by default.
当 vmstorage 跟不上合并部件时，合并辅助就会发生。这通常是 vmsto: Merge assist happens when vmstorage cannot keep up with merging parts. This usually indicates that vmstorage is overloaded.
当前JOB名称，版本号，副本数: Current job name, version and replica count
当前存储中的数据点大小: Size of the datapoints currently in storage
当前组件副本数: Current replica count of the component
当指定addr位置的vmstorage向指定vminsert节点通信，表示当前处: Greater than 0 when the vmstorage at the given addr tells the given vminsert node that it is currently in read-only mode and cannot accept new data
所有存储节点上 LSM 树的最大数据部分数。大量部件（硬限制为 512）是合并性:
Maximum number of data parts of the LSM tree across all storage nodes. A large number of parts (the hard limit is 512) is evidence of slow merge performance - check resource utilization.

indexdb - inverted index
storage/small - recently added parts of data ingested into storage (hot data)
storage/big - small parts gradually merged into big parts (cold data)
所有组件可用CPU总数: Total Available CPUs of All Components
按类型显示已用磁盘空间的百分比：datapoints 或 indexdb。通常，:
Shows the percentage of used disk space by type: datapoints or indexdb. Normally, indexdb takes much less space than datapoints. But with a growing churn rate the indexdb size may grow significantly.

The sum of the percentages can be > 100%, because the panel shows the max % per job and per instance. This means that different instances can have different ratios between datapoints and indexdb size.
按级别显示记录消息的速率。: Shows the rate of logged messages by level.
显示 vminsert 和 vmstorage 组件之间连接的饱和度。如果达到: Shows the saturation of connections between the vminsert and vmstorage components. Reaching the 0.9s threshold means connection saturation is above 90% and vminsert will not be able to keep up. This usually means that more vminsert or vmstorage nodes must be added to the cluster to increase the total number of vminsert -> vmstorage links.
显示一小时时间范围内由于损坏或超出保留时间戳而在插入时忽略了多少行，正常情况下为: Shows how many rows were ignored on insert within a one-hour range because of corruption or timestamps outside the retention period; normally 0;
显示从存储磁盘读取/写入的字节数。: Shows the number of bytes read from and written to the storage disk.
显示在过去一小时内插入新数据点的活动时间序列的数量，如果值变高可能会导致抓取速度:
Shows the number of active time series with new datapoints inserted over the last hour. A high value may slow down ingestion

Details: https://docs.victoriametrics.com/FAQ.html#what-is-an-active-time-series
显示已用内存（常驻）。当内存使用率接近 100% 时，应用程序的性能将逐渐下降。: Shows the used memory (resident). When memory usage approaches 100%, application performance gradually degrades.
显示已用磁盘空间的百分比。建议至少有 20% 的可用磁盘空间以获得最佳性能。: Shows the percentage of used disk space. At least 20% of free disk space is recommended for the best performance.
显示已用磁盘空间的百分比。建议至少有 20% 的可用磁盘空间；: Shows the percentage of used disk space. At least 20% of free disk space is recommended;
显示所有存储节点在过去一小时内插入新数据点的活动时间序列的数量，如果值过高可能会: Shows the number of active time series with new datapoints inserted over the last hour across all storage nodes. A too high value may slow down queries.
显示打开的文件描述符与操作系统中设置的限制的百分比。 \n达到打开文件的限制可能:
Shows the percentage of open file descriptors against the limit set in the OS. 
Reaching the open files limit may cause various problems, so configure alerts in advance.

See how to tune the limit here: https://medium.com/@muhammadtriwibowo/set-permanently-ulimit-n-open-files-in-ubuntu-4d61064429a
显示数据点5分钟时间范围抓取时序值大小，包括复制因子: Shows the size of the datapoints ingested over a 5m range, including the replication factor
显示查询模块的HTTP读请求速率: Shows the HTTP read request rate of the query component
显示正在进行的插入的最大数量。\n\nmax - 默认情况下等于 CPU 数量:
Shows the maximum number of inserts in progress.

max - equals the number of CPUs * 4 by default, configurable with the maxConcurrentInserts flag;

current - the number of goroutines currently busy processing requests.

-maxConcurrentInserts limits the number of insert requests that can be actively processed at any given point in time. All other insert
requests are queued for 

-insert.maxQueueDuration, hoping they get a chance to be processed. The queue is mainly used to absorb spikes of the incoming insert request rate.

When current constantly hits max, it means that the vminsert node is overloaded and needs more CPU or a higher limit.
显示每秒输入存储节点的数据点数。这个指标不会显示所有存储的数据点，因为其中一些数: Shows the number of datapoints per second ingested into storage nodes. This metric does not show all the stored datapoints, since some of them may be dropped because of wrong timestamps or decoding errors.
显示磁盘上正在进行的插入(不是API/写调用)的数量，其中: \n* ' max:
Shows the number of inserts in progress on disk (not API /write calls), where: 
* ' max ' - equals the number of CPUs; 
* ' current ' - the number of goroutines currently busy inserting rows into the underlying storage. 
 
Every successful API /write call is flushed to disk. 'max' is an internal limit and cannot be changed. It is always equal to the number of CPUs. 
 
When 'current' constantly hits 'max', it means that storage is overloaded and needs more CPU or faster disks.
显示缓存丢失率，越低越好；: Shows the cache miss rate; the lower the better;
显示跨实例的最大并发选择数。\n* `max` - 默认情况下等于 CPU 数量:
Shows the maximum number of concurrent selects across instances.
* `max` - equals the number of CPUs * 2 by default. Configurable with the `search.maxConcurrentRequests` flag
* `current` - the number of goroutines currently busy processing requests

When current constantly hits max, it means that one or more vmselect nodes are overloaded and need more CPU or better load balancing. If the CPU panel shows available resources - try increasing `search.maxConcurrentRequests`.
显示过去 24 小时内创建的新系列的比率和总数。\n\n高Churn率与数据库性:
Shows the rate and total number of new series created over the last 24 hours.

A high churn rate is tightly connected with database performance and may result in unexpected OOM or slow queries. It is recommended to always keep an eye on this metric to avoid unexpected cardinality 'explosions'.

The higher the churn rate is, the more resources are required to handle it. Consider keeping the churn rate as low as possible.

To investigate stats about the most expensive TSDB entries, use the api/v1/status/tsdb handler.
Details: https://docs.victoriametrics.com/Cluster-VictoriaMetrics.html#url-format

Recommended reading:
* https://www.robustperception.io/cardinality-is-key
* https://valyala.medium.com/high-cardinality-tsdb-benchmarks-victoriametrics-vs-timescaledb-vs-influxdb-13e6ee64dd6b
查询耗费时间越少越好：\n* ' * ' -不支持的查询路径 \n* ' /wr:
The less time a query takes the better:
* ' * ' - unsupported query path 
* ' /write ' - insert into VM 
* ' /metrics ' - query VM system metrics 
* ' /query ' - query instant values 
* ' /query_range ' - query over a time range 
* ' /series ' - match a certain label set 
* ' /label/{}/values ' - query the list of label values (mostly variables)
根据 search.logSlowQueryDuration 标志进行慢查询，默: Slow queries according to the search.logSlowQueryDuration flag, 5s by default.
请求错误速率：\n* ' * ' -不支持的查询路径 \n* ' /write:
Request error rate:
* ' * ' - unsupported query path 
* ' /write ' - insert into VM 
* ' /metrics ' - query VM system metrics 
* ' /query ' - query instant values 
* ' /query_range ' - query over a time range 
* ' /series ' - match a certain label set 
* ' /label/{}/values ' - query the list of label values (mostly variables)
过去 5 分钟内慢速插入占总插入率的百分比。\n\n值越小越好。如果在较长时间内:
Percentage of slow inserts out of the total insert rate over the last 5 minutes.

The lower the value the better. If the percentage remains high (>10%) for a long period of time, it is likely more RAM is needed for optimal handling of the current number of active time series.

In general, VictoriaMetrics requires ~1KB of RAM per active time series, so it should be easy to calculate the amount of RAM needed for the current workload according to the capacity planning docs. But the resulting number may be far from the real one, since the required amount of memory depends on other factors such as the number of labels per time series and the length of label values.
